24:
(-Letter from a Message Board Keeper-)For our humble part, we shall endeavor to maintain the board in good repair while bringing you news that may be of interest.
With best wishes,
A Message Board Keeper

(-Letter from a Message Board Keeper-)For our humble part, we shall endeavor to maintain the board in good repair while bringing you news that may be of interest.
With best wishes,
A Message Board Keeper

27:
(-Letter from a Choreographist-)In light of this, if but one of my steps or flourishes occupy a place in your memory, then nothing would make me happier.
Movingly yours,
A Humble Choreographist

(-Letter from a Choreographist-)In light of this, if but one of my steps or flourishes occupy a place in your memory, then nothing would make me happier.
Movingly yours,
A Humble Choreographist

31:
(-Letter from an Etiquette Manual Writer-)Dreaming of a day when proper social etiquette is practiced by all, be it in a ballroom or otherwise, I shall continue my quest to edify.
Courteously yours,
An Etiquette Manual Writer

(-Letter from an Etiquette Manual Writer-)Dreaming of a day when proper social etiquette is practiced by all, be it in a ballroom or otherwise, I shall continue my quest to edify.
Courteously yours,
An Etiquette Manual Writer

32:
(-Letter from a Theater Set Designer-)Dear adventurer,
I am a theater set designer, and one who is said to have a penchant for designing unusual props for the stage.

(-Letter from a Theater Set Designer-)Dear adventurer,
I am a theater set designer, and one who is said to have a penchant for designing unusual props for the stage.

35:
(-Letter from a Theater Set Designer-)In hopes that I can continue to delight you all, I will endeavor to create ever more interesting props!
Yours in whimsy,
A Theater Set Designer

(-Letter from a Theater Set Designer-)In hopes that I can continue to delight you all, I will endeavor to create ever more interesting props!
Yours in whimsy,
A Theater Set Designer

36:
(-Letter from a Festival Committee Member-)Dear adventurer,
I am a festival committee member in charge of decorating the cities during celebrations.

(-Letter from a Festival Committee Member-)Dear adventurer,
I am a festival committee member in charge of decorating the cities during celebrations.

38:
(-Letter from a Festival Committee Member-)As you continue your adventures, it is our hope that the festive ambience we create throughout the year will provide you with joy and respite both.
Mirthfully yours,
A Festival Committee Member

(-Letter from a Festival Committee Member-)As you continue your adventures, it is our hope that the festive ambience we create throughout the year will provide you with joy and respite both.
Mirthfully yours,
A Festival Committee Member

41:
(-Letter from an Architect-)Yours is a long journey; what little we can do to ease your way, we gladly do.
Constructively yours,
A Humble Architect

(-Letter from an Architect-)Yours is a long journey; what little we can do to ease your way, we gladly do.
Constructively yours,
A Humble Architect

45:
(-Letter from an Artisan-)Thank you for taking the time to cast your eyes over these words. Wherever your adventures may lead, may you find happiness.
With utmost respect,
A Nameless Artisan

(-Letter from an Artisan-)Thank you for taking the time to cast your eyes over these words. Wherever your adventures may lead, may you find happiness.
With utmost respect,
A Nameless Artisan

49:
(-Letter from a Linguist-)As you carry on adventuring, I pray that you will be blessed with many such enriching encounters.
Yours in understanding and unity,
A Humble Linguist

(-Letter from a Linguist-)As you carry on adventuring, I pray that you will be blessed with many such enriching encounters.
Yours in understanding and unity,
A Humble Linguist

50:
(-Letter from a Citizen-)Dear adventurer,
During the Calamity and for a long time afterwards, there was nary a smile to be seen upon faces.

(-Letter from a Citizen-)Dear adventurer,
During the Calamity and for a long time afterwards, there was nary a smile to be seen upon faces.

52:
(-Letter from a Citizen-)No one can say what the future holds, but when I see your smiles, I am reassured that somehow all will be well.
Sincerely yours,
A Humble Citizen

(-Letter from a Citizen-)No one can say what the future holds, but when I see your smiles, I am reassured that somehow all will be well.
Sincerely yours,
A Humble Citizen

55:
(-Letter from a Theater Director-)For a long time to come, I hope to continue creating memorable adventures to share with everyone.
Yours in imagination and wonderment,
A Humble Theater Director

(-Letter from a Theater Director-)For a long time to come, I hope to continue creating memorable adventures to share with everyone.
Yours in imagination and wonderment,
A Humble Theater Director

58:
(-Letter from an Advertising Scribe-)Thank you always for your kindness and compassion.
Communicatively yours,
A Humble Advertising Scribe

(-Letter from an Advertising Scribe-)Thank you always for your kindness and compassion.
Communicatively yours,
A Humble Advertising Scribe

62:
(-Letter from a Guide-)Should you have any comments or suggestions, please do not hesitate to reach out. We always appreciate hearing from you!
Informatively yours,
A Humble Guide

(-Letter from a Guide-)Should you have any comments or suggestions, please do not hesitate to reach out. We always appreciate hearing from you!
Informatively yours,
A Humble Guide

65:
(-Letter from a Gatekeeper-)Inspired by the eager expressions you wear as you set forth anew, we will continue performing our task to the best of our ability!
Vigilantly yours,
A Humble Gatekeeper

(-Letter from a Gatekeeper-)Inspired by the eager expressions you wear as you set forth anew, we will continue performing our task to the best of our ability!
Vigilantly yours,
A Humble Gatekeeper

69:
(-Letter from a Playwright-)In order to create such depressing lows and soaring highs, I will strive to conceive of more compelling antagonists.
Dramatically yours,
A Humble Playwright

(-Letter from a Playwright-)In order to create such depressing lows and soaring highs, I will strive to conceive of more compelling antagonists.
Dramatically yours,
A Humble Playwright

72:
(-Letter from a Theater Composer-)You are my motivation, spurring me to continue composing music that brings the story to life, and I thank you from the bottom of my heart.
Yours in the melody,
A Humble Theater Composer

(-Letter from a Theater Composer-)You are my motivation, spurring me to continue composing music that brings the story to life, and I thank you from the bottom of my heart.
Yours in the melody,
A Humble Theater Composer

76:
(-Letter from a Theater Sound Designer-)It is a collaboration between us─a joint performance─and it is my hope that we can continue filling the world with sound together.
Acoustically yours,
A Humble Theater Sound Designer

(-Letter from a Theater Sound Designer-)It is a collaboration between us─a joint performance─and it is my hope that we can continue filling the world with sound together.
Acoustically yours,
A Humble Theater Sound Designer

82:
(-Letter from an Adventurer-)So come what may, I intend to carry on as far as my path leads. I won't surrender─and I pray that neither will you!
Yours in perseverance,
A Faceless Adventurer

(-Letter from an Adventurer-)So come what may, I intend to carry on as far as my path leads. I won't surrender─and I pray that neither will you!
Yours in perseverance,
A Faceless Adventurer
